title: MOM Memory Document
description: Schema for all documents in the MOM memory vault

id.description: Unique identifier, kebab-case. Must match filename (minus .json)

scope.description: core = universal (from MOM core), project = specific to this project

boot.description: If true, this doc is loaded at boot time

summary.description: Concise one-line description used by the adapter to render in the runtime context file

tags.description: Tags are the synapses — lowercase kebab-case, free-form

created_by.description: Which user or actor created this doc (e.g., owner, vmarino)

valid_to.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this memory stops being valid. Null means indefinitely valid.

session_id.description: Links this document to the runtime session that produced it

promotion_state.description: draft = raw extraction, curated = reviewed/classified. Default: draft.

classification.description: Access classification for ABAC. Default: INTERNAL.

provenance.description: Capture provenance — runtime, trigger, and raw exhaust reference.

runtime.description: Runtime/service that created this memory (e.g., mom-draft, mom-map, claude-code)

trigger_event.description: Event that triggered creation (e.g., stop, pre-compact, clear, draft, map)

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA at time of capture (set by git integration, not the runtime)

raw_exhaust_ref.description: Pointer to the specific raw JSONL file this memory was extracted from

landmark.description: True if this memory is a navigation landmark. Default: false.

content.description: Free-form content object. Shape is determined by the producing service.
